---
title: "Complete materials map (both reference courses)"
---

This course uses and integrates all core teaching material from:

- [CBA Gen3sis Workshop 2024](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/README.md)
- [YoMos Gen3sis Workshop](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/README.md)

## A) CBA Gen3sis Workshop material {.unnumbered}

### Quarto lessons {.unnumbered}

- [index.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/index.qmd)
- [Day1_Prac1_setup.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac1_setup.qmd)
- [Day1_Prac2_basics.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac2_basics.qmd)
- [Day1_Prac3_islands.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac3_islands.qmd)
- [Day2_Prac4_outputs.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day2_Prac4_outputs.qmd)
- [Day2_Prac5_landscapes.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day2_Prac5_landscapes.qmd)
- [Day3_Prac6_sandbox.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day3_Prac6_sandbox.qmd)
- [Day3_landscape_development.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day3_landscape_development.qmd)
- [considerations.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/considerations.qmd)
- [resources.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/resources.qmd)

### Configuration files {.unnumbered}

- [config_start.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_start.R)
- [config_islands_Day1Prac1.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_Day1Prac1.R)
- [config_southamerica_Day1Prac1.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_southamerica_Day1Prac1.R)
- [config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M1.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M1.R)
- [config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M2.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M2.R)
- [config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M3.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M3.R)
- [config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M4.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day1Prac3_M4.R)
- [config_islands_simple_Day2Prac5.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_simple_Day2Prac5.R)
- [config_islands_Day3_ELH.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_Day3_ELH.R)
- [island_config_M0.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/island_config_M0.R)
- [island_config_M2.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/island_config_M2.R)

### Data and helper assets {.unnumbered}

- [support.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/support.R)
- [data/landscapes](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/data/landscapes)
- [output/islands](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/output/islands)
- [output/SouthAmerica](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/output/SouthAmerica)

## B) YoMos Gen3sis Workshop material {.unnumbered}

### Main workshop lesson {.unnumbered}

- [gen3sis_workshop.qmd](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/gen3sis_workshop.qmd)
- [gen3sis_workshop.html](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/gen3sis_workshop.html)

### Scripts, configurations, and simulation inputs {.unnumbered}

- [myscript.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/myscript.R)
- [config/config_simple.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_simple.R)
- [config/config_M0_TH.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_M0_TH.R)
- [config/config_M2_TH.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_M2_TH.R)
- [space/landscapes.rds](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/space/landscapes.rds)
- [space/distances_local](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/space/distances_local)
- [output/config_simple](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/output/config_simple)
- [output/config_M2_TH_mod](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/output/config_M2_TH_mod)

## Suggested run order for SoSe 2026 {.unnumbered}

1. Day 1 setup + basics (CBA Day 1 + YoMos Sections 1–2).
2. Day 2 outputs + world building + hypothesis experiments (CBA Day 2 + YoMos Sections 3–4).
3. Day 3 sandbox + critical synthesis + troubleshooting + flash talks (CBA Day 3 + YoMos Section 5).
